'''habafa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oophorectomy|oophorectomy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-b-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oophorectomy|oophorectomy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| habafa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæbæfæth|hæbæfæth]] || [[word:hæbæfæj|hæbæfæj]] || [[word:hæbæfæsh|hæbæfæsh]] || [[word:hæbæfæ|hæbæfæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hababafath|hababafath]] || [[word:hababafaj|hababafaj]] || [[word:hababafash|hababafash]] || [[word:hababafa|hababafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:habafath|habafath]] || [[word:habafaj|habafaj]] || [[word:habafash|habafash]] || [[word:habafa|habafa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:habaffath|habaffath]] || [[word:habaffaj|habaffaj]] || [[word:habaffash|habaffash]] || [[word:habaffaf|habaffaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:habafatha|habafatha]] || [[word:habafaja|habafaja]] || [[word:habafasha|habafasha]] || [[word:habafaka|habafaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:habafath|habafath]] || [[word:habafaj|habafaj]] || [[word:habafash|habafash]] || [[word:habafa|habafa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:habafathal|habafathal]] || [[word:habafajal|habafajal]] || [[word:habafashal|habafashal]] || [[word:habafakal|habafakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:habafathatha|habafathatha]] || [[word:habafajaja|habafajaja]] || [[word:habafashasha|habafashasha]] || [[word:habafaka|habafaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:habafathan|habafathan]] || [[word:habafajan|habafajan]] || [[word:habafashan|habafashan]] || [[word:habafakan|habafakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:habafathaoro|habafathaoro]] || [[word:habafajaoro|habafajaoro]] || [[word:habafashaoro|habafashaoro]] || [[word:habafakaoro|habafakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
